variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12574 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12574 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12574 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 48.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 36.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 24.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter CS 51 Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12574
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CS 51 Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12574
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.
specifications: Style: Ventilator, Dimension A: 48.0 mm, Dimension B: 34.0 mm, Dimension H: 24.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P502518 Breather, Hydraulic | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12574
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P502518 Breather, Hydraulic | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12574
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P502518 Breather, Hydraulic is designed to provide reliable performance in breather, hydraulic applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard HF28926 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12574
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF28926 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12574
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF28926 hydraulic cartridge filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
